recommendations.director: Robert McKimson, Friz Freleng, Chuck Jones

recommendations.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas!

recommendations.title: Feed the Kitty
recommendations.overview: A bulldog adopts an adorable kitten, but he can't let his owner know.

recommendations.director: Robert McKimson, Friz Freleng, Chuck Jones

recommendations.title: Speedy Gonzales
recommendations.overview: Speedy comes to the aid of a group of mice trying to get the cheese from a factory guarded by Sylvester.

recommendations.title: Robin Hood Daffy
recommendations.overview: Daffy attempts to convince Porky, as Friar Tuck, that he really is Robin Hood.

recommendations.title: Duck Dodgers in the 24½th Century
recommendations.overview: Space hero Daffy battles Marvin the Martian for control of Planet X.

recommendations.title: The Looney, Looney, Looney Bugs Bunny Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Crime, Music, Western
recommendations.overview: Bugs Bunny hosts an award show featuring several classic Looney Tunes shorts and characters.

recommendations.title: Hair-Raising Hare
recommendations.overview: A sneaker-wearing, hairy monster chases Bugs through a castle belonging to an evil scientist.

recommendations.title: Duck Amuck
recommendations.overview: The short-tempered Daffy Duck must improvise madly as the backgrounds, his costumes, the soundtrack, even his physical form, shifts and changes at the whim of the animator.
